results.snippet: # Project Context Standard Every active project should have a `PROJECT_CONTEXT.md` file. ## Required Sections - Project name - Purpose - Current status - Latest version/tag - Latest evidence - Next action - Risks - Connected repos - Human approval status ## Why This Exists The AI should not ask the human to explain the same project from zero every time. The project context preserves continuity.
